ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "listing_type" TEXT /* Type of listing (e.g., Multi-family home for sale) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "full_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the property */,
  "bed" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bath" TEXT /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot" TEXT /* Lot size of the property (if applicable) */,
  "lot_conversion_to_sqft" INTEGER /* Lot size converted to square feet */,
  "house_type" TEXT /* Type of house (e.g., Multiple Occupancy) */,
  "year_build" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "parking" TEXT /* Parking options available */,
  "hoa" TEXT /* Homeowners Association (HOA) fees */,
  "zestimate" TEXT /* Zillow estimate of the property value */,
  "rent_zestimate" TEXT /* Zillow estimate of the rental value */,
  "zillow_price_per_sqft" TEXT /* Zillow price per square foot */,
  "house_website" TEXT /* URL to the property's website */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent responsible for the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property */,
  "appliances" TEXT /* List of appliances included in the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "proximity_to_essential_services" TEXT /* Proximity to essential services (e.g., hospitals, schools, grocery stores) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., exterior, interior, aerial) */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., title, inspection report) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the document, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., interior, exterior, amenities) */,
  "feature_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the feature (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., in-person, virtual) */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the offer is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the offer */,
  "offer_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "offer_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the offer */,
  "offer_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property added to favorites */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the property */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the property was added to favorites */,
  "favorite_notes" TEXT /* Notes about why the property was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property added to comparisons */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the property */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the property was added to comparisons */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comparisons_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the transaction */,
  "transaction_payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., price change, status update) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., agent, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the property */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, location, condition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ratings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the contact is for */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Contact value (e.g., phone number, email address) */,
  "contact_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_contacts_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
